design_philosophy: Distinctive and authentic to Brera, Milan. An editorial, tactile, and cartographic experience that feels like discovering hidden gems in an artistic, historic quarter. Mobile-first design where the map is the hero.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing, optical alignment, mobile-first priority.

navigation.style: Bottom tab bar for mobile users, utilizing glassmorphism to float above the map without obscuring it.

map.style: Full-screen hero layout. Use custom styled Leaflet tiles with warm sepia/vintage tones matching the background #F7F4EB. Disable default UI controls to keep it cinematic.
map.markers: Use custom SVG icons (Deep Green for undiscovered, Warm Ochre for in-range, Terracotta for visited).

poi_drawer.style: Bottom sheet (Shadcn customized) that slides up when in proximity or tapped. Rounded-t-3xl, no heavy shadows, just a 1px border. Tactile drag handle at top.

proximity_radar.style: Floating circular UI element. Uses pulsating rings that expand. Color transitions from #1E3A2F (far/cold) to #BD5745 (close/hot).
proximity_radar.vibration_logic: Map distance to navigator.vibrate() frequency and intensity.

admin_panel.style: Clean, dense dashboard for POI CRUD operations. Uses 'Swiss & High-Contrast' principles but tinted with the brand colors. Shadcn DataTables and Forms.

motion.proximity_rings: Framer-motion spring animations. Scale and opacity pulse based on distance metric.
motion.drawer: Smooth y-axis spring physics for entering and exiting the viewport.
motion.page_transitions: Subtle fade and slide-up (y: 10px) on route changes.

textures.category: Vintage Map Texture Overlay (Blend-mode: multiply, low opacity)

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards against the off-white background.
accessibility_and_testing.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the proximity radar.
accessibility_and_testing.test_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='proximity-radar', data-testid='poi-card').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first PWA. The primary interface is a full-screen interactive map using react-leaflet.
Apply the designated color palette (Terracotta, Deep Green, Ochre, Off-white) strictly. Do NOT use default Tailwind blues or purples.
Implement the 'Proximity Radar' component visually showing distance, and tie it to the web Vibration API (navigator.vibrate).
Use a bottom sheet (Drawer) for displaying POI details when tapped or triggered by proximity.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings to maintain the editorial, Milanese artistic vibe.
Include a 'Reset POI Data' toggle in the Admin section for student-led data entry exercises.
Ensure all mock POI images utilize the provided unsplash/pexels URLs.
Include data-testid tags on all actionable elements.
